title: Chamuwtal #2537
definition:
Hamutal = "father-in-law is protection"

 1) one of the wives of Josiah, daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah, mother
    of Jehoahaz and Zedekiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hamutal = "father-in-law is protection"

 1) one of the wives of Josiah, daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah, mother
    of Jehoahaz and Zedekiah

    NASB:  perh. my husbands father is the dew, mother of two kings of Judah
